generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure to capture real-time temperature data, integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for standardized data ingestion. Extracts tenant IDs and device endpoints from BIM model for automated configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time humidity levels integrated through Eclipse Hono middleware, with metadata extraction from BIM model enabling automated DT data pipeline configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring ambient light levels deployed in building infrastructure, connected via Ditto platform for real-time data transmission with BIM-derived device configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting occupancy patterns integrated through Eclipse Hono, with automated configuration enabled by BIM model metadata extraction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor monitoring real-time energy consumption across building systems, ingested via Ditto platform with BIM-derived device endpoint information."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic-rich 3D representation of building geometry, topology, and component relationships in IFC or proprietary BIM format, enriched with device configurations and DT-specific metadata."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler, BIMToolEnabler
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing real-time operational data including sensor readings, control signals, and device statuses ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataIngestionEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for building control systems (e.g., lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) embedded in BIM model and transformed into executable policies via MDE tools."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets for interactive 3D rendering of the DT, enabling immersive monitoring and control visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ServiceModelRegistry : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ditto service registry containing customizable service definitions including AI models and optimization algorithms for integration via standardized APIs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware providing secure, scalable data ingestion from heterogeneous sensors with standardized MQTT protocol support for real-time operational data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented platform enabling bidirectional communication, device management, and service orchestration with standardized Ditto device configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService, VisualizationService, ExtensionService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization engine providing immersive interactive simulation environment for real-time monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools performing M2M and M2T transformations to generate runtime artifacts from BIM models including Ditto device configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
]

instance BIMToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industry-standard BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) for modeling and enriching BIM assets with DT-specific metadata including device configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
]

instance DataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware layer handling real-time data ingestion from Eclipse Hono to time-series database storage with millisecond-to-second synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Platform enabling reinforcement learning-based optimization (BOREALIS project) for energy-efficient building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of operational data including energy consumption and environmental metrics via Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for optimizing building operations including energy-efficient lighting and adaptive HVAC."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional synchronization of BIM models with physical devices for seamless integration of control systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningAction
]

instance ExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services including AI-driven fault detection and occupancy-based control."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceInsight
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic adjustment of DT parameters including sensor thresholds and control policies without full redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device configurations and automated modeling within BIM environment for control logic definition."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationAction
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing bidirectional control logic between DT and physical actuators for real-time building operation optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of DT components and real-time operational data."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from heterogeneous sensors through Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboards showing energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions for operational monitoring."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "AI-driven suggestions for improving energy efficiency including adaptive lighting schedules and HVAC optimization."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for potential equipment failures based on sensor anomaly detection and predictive analytics."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building components and operational data enabling interactive monitoring."
]

instance CustomServiceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration points for custom services including AI-driven fault detection and occupancy-based control systems."
]

instance CommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated synchronization of BIM models with physical devices for seamless control system integration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control commands sent to physical actuators based on DT-generated control policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of DT parameters including sensor thresholds and reinforcement learning model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of device configurations from BIM model metadata for deployment in Ditto platform."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of real-time data ingestion quality and synchronization fidelity between physical sensors and DT."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator controlling lighting systems with bidirectional communication enabled through Ditto platform and BIM model integration."
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator regulating HVAC systems with automated configuration from BIM model enabling real-time control."
]

instance MotorizedShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled actuator controlling motorized window shades with BIM-derived control logic for adaptive environmental management."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 LightingControllerActuator, HVACValveActuator, MotorizedShadeActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMCoreModel, RuntimeOperationalData, ControlLogicModel, VisualizationModel, ServiceModelRegistry,
                 EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler, ModelTransformationEnabler,
                 BIMToolEnabler, DataIngestionEnabler, AnalyticsEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **control logic embedded in the DT**, which generates actionable commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time analytics, predictive models, or user inputs. These commands are transmitted back to the physical system via Ditto’s **bidirectional API**, enabling the DT to act as a **virtual control hub**. The framework supports **real-time feedback loops**, where the DT dynamically adjusts control parameters (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) in response to operational data, closing the loop between virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale ranges from **millisecond-level synchronization** for critical control loops (e.g., HVAC actuators) to **second-to-minute intervals** for monitoring and analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). The framework supports **real-time updates** (≤1 second latency) for sensor data ingestion and control command execution, while higher-level services (e.g., predictive modeling) operate on aggregated data with **minute-to-hourly time granularity**. The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic.
   - **IoT Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
   - **Control Engine**: Executes runtime policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on operational data.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive interaction with the DT.
   - **Extension Points**: Standardized APIs for integrating custom services (e.g., analytics, AI-driven diagnostics) developed by DT Engineers. The constellation ensures **scalability** by decoupling core DT functionalities from modular extensions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life cycle stages** of the building infrastructure, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. Key phases include:
   - **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with device configurations and control logic for DT deployment.
   - **Construction Phase**: Physical sensors/actuators are commissioned and integrated into the DT via automated workflows.
   - **Operation Phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** throughout the building’s occupancy.
   - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: The DT supports **dynamic reconfiguration** of models and services to accommodate structural or functional changes. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with evolving AECO standards and technologies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: BIM models are validated for consistency and completeness before deployment (e.g., checking for missing device configurations).
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enforce **low-latency data exchange** with millisecond-level precision for critical control loops.
   - **ODTE Metric**: Quantifies the **entanglement** between the PT and DT, measuring alignment across geometric, functional, and operational dimensions.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor noise, communication delays, and model drift** via adaptive control policies (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
   - **Verification**: Custom services are tested in isolation before integration to ensure correctness and interoperability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** as the primary technical connection layer, using:
   - **MQTT Protocol**: For lightweight, publish-subscribe communication between sensors/actuators and the DT.
   - **RESTful APIs**: Ditto’s service-oriented architecture enables **bidirectional HTTP-based interactions** for control commands and data queries.
   - **WebSockets**: Real-time updates for visualization and interactive monitoring in Unreal Engine 5.
   The connection architecture supports **scalable, secure, and low-latency** communication across heterogeneous IoT devices and cloud-based DT services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-based deployment environment**, leveraging:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto Cloud**: Managed middleware for IoT data ingestion and service orchestration.
   - **Unreal Engine 5 Cloud**: For scalable 3D visualization and interactive simulations.
   - **Containerized Microservices**: Ditto’s service registry enables **decentralized deployment** of custom services (e.g., AI models) in isolated containers.
   The framework supports **hybrid deployment** (on-premise/cloud) to accommodate data sovereignty and latency requirements."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports horizontal integration with:
   - **External IoT Platforms**: Compatibility with third-party IoT ecosystems via Ditto’s **open APIs**.
   - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Seamless interoperability with proprietary BMS solutions (e.g., Siemens Desigo, Honeywell) through standardized protocols.
   - **Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)**: Integration with ERP systems for cost modeling and asset lifecycle management.
   - **Other Digital Twins**: Potential linkage with **domain-specific DTs** (e.g., urban DTs) via Ditto’s service registry for cross-system collaboration."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed through:
   - **BIM-Centric Ownership**: The building owner retains ownership of the **core BIM model** and operational data, while DT service providers may manage **derived analytics** or **custom service outputs**.
   - **Encrypted Data Transmission**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enforce **end-to-end encryption** for IoT data in transit.
   - **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**: Ditto’s service registry supports **granular permissions** for stakeholders (e.g., Building Control Engineers vs. Facility Managers).
   - **GDPR Compliance**: The framework includes mechanisms for **data anonymization** and **right-to-erasure** to comply with privacy regulations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) or proprietary BIM formats for semantic modeling.
   - **IoT Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto comply with **OMA LWM2M** and **MQTT** for device management and data exchange.
   - **Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA)**: Ditto’s API follows **RESTful principles** and **OAS (OpenAPI Specification)** for interoperability.
   - **AECO-Specific Standards**: Alignment with **ISO 19650** for BIM collaboration and **ISO 55000** for asset management.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Uses **MOF (Meta Object Facility)** and **QVT (Query/View/Transformation)** for automated model transformations."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Authentication/Authorization**: Ditto enforces **OAuth 2.0** and **JWT-based authentication** for all DT interactions.
   - **Network Isolation**: Eclipse Hono provides **sandboxed IoT device connections** to prevent lateral movement attacks.
   - **Fail-Safe Mechanisms**: The DT includes **emergency shutdown protocols** for critical control systems (e.g., HVAC) to prevent operational hazards.
   - **Cybersecurity Audits**: Regular validation of **data integrity** and **access controls** to mitigate risks of unauthorized DT manipulation.
   - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Critical operations (e.g., remote adjustments to physical systems) require **manual approval** from Facility Managers to ensure safety."
]
